title: Gooey Algerian Dates Stir-fry
description: A herbal and gooey crowd-pleaser Algerian dish featuring ready rolled shortcrust pastry with a Mediterranean-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Gooey Dates
ingredients.notes: Choose the ones that are already gooey and chewy

ingredients.name: Pomegranate Juice
ingredients.notes: Add more as needed to reach desired consistency

ingredients.name: Almond Flakes or Almonds
ingredients.notes: Optional for added crunch and flavor

instructions: Place the sheets of shortcrust pastry on a baking sheet.
Using a spoon or melon baller, scoop out balls from gooey dates and place them onto the prepared sheets. Make sure not to overcrowd them as they will expand during cooking.
Sprinkle almond flakes (if using) evenly over the date balls for crunchiness.
Drizzle with pomegranate juice until you get a desired consistency, making sure not to flood it – you want some air pockets in between and on top of the dates.
Bake in preheated oven for about 10-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the edges.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving. Store any leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature.
For best results, prepare ahead of time as it needs to be chilled if served cold.
